refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved, analyze energy efficiency performance, and provide actionable feedback to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is high-level and needs decomposition into measurable and controllable sub-functions to enable design and verification. Monitoring, analysis, and feedback are key functions to achieve and maintain energy efficiency.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by measuring energy_per_ton = energy_used / ton_moved over the evaluation period and confirming it meets ≤ E_target; verify monitoring accuracy, analysis correctness, and feedback effectiveness.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Analyze energy efficiency performance against target.
FR3: Provide actionable feedback to operators or systems to improve energy efficiency.

candidate_dps: DP1: Integrate energy and tonnage sensors with data acquisition system.
DP2: Implement energy efficiency analytics algorithms to compute KPI and trends.
DP3: Develop feedback mechanisms via operator interface and automated control signals.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, and DP3 combined to cover monitoring, analysis, and feedback functions respectively.

potential_sources: Data flow dependencies between monitoring and analysis
Feedback loop coupling between analysis and feedback mechanisms
coupling_check.notes: The DPs are logically coupled but can be modularized with clear interfaces to minimize complexity.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate sensor data availability and reliable network communication.
Risk of delayed or inaccurate feedback impacting energy efficiency.
High safety criticality requires robust error handling and fail-safe feedback.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit error detection and safety monitoring DP to address high safety criticality.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level integration of energy monitoring, analysis, and feedback functions.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data for energy consumption and tonnage moved.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends feedback commands or recommendations to Vehicle or Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Issues alerts if energy efficiency targets are not met or safety thresholds breached.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and other modules for data exchange.

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary container for energy efficiency functions; low diffusion risk.
Receives feedback but does not contain core energy efficiency logic.
May receive tasking feedback but limited containment role.
Supports safety alerts but not core energy efficiency processing.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing energy efficiency logic in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and safety management.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck or single point of failure in NGHE Solution module.
Interface complexity with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for feedback delivery.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and redundancy/failover mechanisms within NGHE Solution to mitigate risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the high-level requirement into measurable sub-functions; selected DPs logically satisfy these sub-functions with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk by centralizing logic in NGHE Solution module.
Interfaces to Vehicle and Teleoperation are well-defined to limit diffusion.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as primary module; other modules have limited containment roles.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and feedback command logs; interfaces support traceability.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to DPs and IM boundary with explicit interface mapping.

recommended_revisions: Add explicit error detection DP and corresponding IM responsibilities to address safety criticality.
Refine interface definitions to include error and status reporting.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, the high safety criticality and risk of feedback failure require explicit error detection and safety monitoring functions to be added at this level before proceeding.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Analyze energy efficiency performance against target.
FR3: Provide actionable feedback to operators or systems to improve energy efficiency.
FR4: Detect errors and ensure safety compliance in energy efficiency operations.

revise.why: To incorporate safety-critical error detection and monitoring functions explicitly, ensuring robust and safe energy efficiency management.

assumptions: Sensor data and network communication are reliable.
Interfaces can support additional error and safety reporting.
open_risks: Potential single point of failure in NGHE Solution module.
Timeliness and accuracy of feedback impacting safety and efficiency.
